# ARFM (Agent-Readable File Manager)

This workspace contains a bimodal project coordinator:
- Human format: Markdown topics in `/topics/`
- Machine format: JSON(-LD-like) derived from Markdown and validated with JSON Schema templates in `/templates/`
- Change tracking: atomic block-level history in `/history/tracker.json`

## Local HTTP API (default dev)

Base: `http://localhost:5174`

- `GET /api/topics` — list topics
- `GET /api/topics/:name` — load topic markdown + resolved template
- `PUT /api/topics/:name` — save topic markdown (preserves/repairs block @id tags, writes history)
- `GET /api/history` — read tracker history
- `POST /api/chat` — mock LLM chat (supports tool: `propose_edit`)

## MCP server (integrated)

The backend exposes an MCP server with a tool:
- `propose_edit` — propose a change to a specific `Block_ID` given template rules and history context.
